candidates.prompt: six compact animal kung-fu school pictograms in one horizontal sprite sheet, equal-width cells, transparent background, VINIK24 pixel art, 24px legibility, bold silhouettes, 1-2px dark ink stroke, 2px safe padding, Bear Ox Crane Swallow Snake Eagle in that order. no anti-alias blur, no off-palette colors, no painterly gradients, no unreadable micro-detail, no text labels, no fake UI
candidates.generator: aiexp pixel-art run --model google/gemini-3.1-flash-image-preview --palettes vinik24 --size 256 --kind sprite --remove-bg
candidates.notes: Automated reviewer scored faithfulness 0.40: generated a grid, an extra snake, and no usable transparent background.

candidates.prompt: exactly six kung-fu animal school mark pictograms arranged left-to-right in one single horizontal row across the center of the canvas: bear head, ox head, standing crane, swallow in flight, coiled snake, eagle head. No boxes, no grid, no dividers, no extra animals, no labels. Each pictogram is a compact bold silhouette seal mark with 1-2 pixel dark ink outline and 2 pixel padding, readable at 24px, using only VINIK24 colors. Background must be perfectly flat solid #FF00FF chroma key and must not appear inside the icons. Order must be Bear Ox Crane Swallow Snake Eagle.
candidates.generator: aiexp pixel-art run --model google/gemini-3.1-flash-image-preview --palettes vinik24 --size 256 --kind sprite --remove-bg
candidates.notes: Automated reviewer scored faithfulness 0.60: correct six/order and clean chroma, but arranged as two rows instead of one.

candidates.prompt: six compact animal kung-fu school pictograms in one horizontal sprite sheet, equal-width cells, transparent background, VINIK24 pixel art, 24px legibility, bold silhouettes, 1-2px dark ink stroke, 2px safe padding, Bear Ox Crane Swallow Snake Eagle in that order. no anti-alias blur, no off-palette colors, no painterly gradients, no unreadable micro-detail, no text labels, no fake UI
candidates.notes: Direct Pixelforge API candidate with exact 384x64 output.

candidates.prompt: exactly six standalone wuxia school seal pictograms in one unbroken left-to-right row on transparent background: bear, ox, crane, swallow, snake, eagle. Equal spacing, no boxes, no grid, no dividers, no labels, no extra animals. Each mark is a bold readable 24px animal silhouette with dark ink outline and 2-3 VINIK24 colors, consistent stroke weight, strong negative space, designed as game UI icons.
candidates.notes: Direct Pixelforge API Gemini retry after openai/gpt-5.4-image-2 returned an OpenRouter 429 for this second slot.

candidates.prompt: Create exactly one horizontal transparent sprite sheet, 384x64 pixels, divided conceptually into six equal 64x64 cells but draw no cell borders. Each cell contains one LARGE centered animal-head pictogram, not a person: bear head, ox head with horns, crane head and neck, swallow bird silhouette, coiled snake head/body mark, eagle head. Every animal fills most of its 64x64 cell, about 44-54 pixels tall, with 2-4 pixels safe padding. Bold simple game UI icons, strong readable silhouette, 1-2 pixel dark ink outline, 2-3 VINIK24 colors, no humans, no full-body fighters, no extra animals, no labels, no grid, no dividers.
candidates.notes: Best structural candidate in this pass; bear/ox/crane/snake/eagle read at 24px, swallow remains weak.
